behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names build.ts path hint (js/preview/src/), the exports array construction, build() call, pkg.exports reference, and the 1/2 entry counts asserted by tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and expected behavior but does not prescribe the exact fix (e.g., spread operator with ternary).

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (array length, no crash) and loose structural markers (build(, pkg.exports); alternative fixes like if-push, filter, or ternary spread would all pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract code from build.ts and execute it via Node.js subprocess with mock pkg objects, checking runtime behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning empty would fail test_example_present_two_entries (needs 2) and test_missing_example_one_entry (needs 1); both cannot be satisfied by a trivial stub.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover missing example (no crash, 1 entry), null example (no crash), present example (2 entries), format check, and build logic presence.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and annotated with [pr_diff]/[static]/[repo_tests] tags.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear consistent (js/preview/src/build.ts, pnpm format:check).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to js/preview/src/ directory and describes symptom; does not name exact line or the fix construct.
